homeFeedPlaceholder: Coming soon: highlights and recommendations. Use Schedule for events; Explore for venues.
artistsFiltersHint: Use the search bar and chips above. Category shortcuts use genres from the API when available.
bookingNeedTarget: Open this screen from an artist or venue with a booking target.
bookingOrganizerArtistLabel: Your artist profile (required for venue inquiries)
bookingNeedOrganizerArtist: Enter your artist profile ID for requests to a venue.
homeSubtitle: Concerts, festivals, and sessions with upcoming dates
exploreSubtitle: Rooms, bars, studios, and venues — find where the music happens
mapOpenListA11y: Open results list for the region, {{count}} items
mapEmptyRegion: No events or venues in this part of the map.
mapWebFallback: The interactive map is available on the iOS and Android apps.
filtersOpenToInquiries: Only venues open to artist inquiries
createPartnerVenueHint: Venues join through the eClose program for promoters and venues.
createPartnerVenueA11y: Open information about partner venue registration
createEventHint: Dates in ISO 8601; you need an artist profile (we’ll create one if needed).
createEventScreenPlaceholder: The event creation form (dates, venue, media) will go here. For now this is a placeholder.
createVenueHint: Minimum details to list your venue (address and hours).
createVenueNeedLogin: Sign in to create a venue.
createEventNeedLogin: Sign in to create an event.
createEventNoVenues: No linked venues — use a location label.
createEventValidationArtist: Choose or create an artist profile.
createEventValidationPhysical: Pick a venue or a location label.
partnerSheetLead: Want to list your venue on eClose?
partnerSheetBody: Venue registration is done in partnership: validation, business data, and marketplace visibility. We’ll reach out or use official support channels when the flow opens.
createMvpBody: In the current MVP the app focuses on discovering events and venues. Creating events, booking requests, and organizer tools are coming in a later phase.
venueVerifyHint: MVP: paste public (HTTPS) file URLs. Direct upload will come later.
venueVerifyPendingBody: Your documentation is under review. We’ll notify you when there’s a decision.
venueVerifyRejectedIntro: The last submission wasn’t accepted. Fix the data or attachments and submit again.
venueVerifyNeedAccess: Only the venue owner can see this page. Sign in with the correct account.
